violations.text: At the time of inspection, an on-site manager certified in food safety was not available as required at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC is to ensure extra employees are certified and available as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The available log sheets for recording Time as a Public Health Control for Pizza Slices were observed not being used. PIC is to ensure log sheets are regularly used and maintained as required by RIDOH CFP approval for use of Time as a Public Health Control. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - walk-in cooler fan shroud - cheese grater attachment Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. Cleaning of non-food-contact surfaces began at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

Deli meat was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Deli meat was stored above cold hold line due to container not fitting. Establishment to order new containers that tightly fit in unit to allow food to be stored below cold hold line. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Deli meat was recently placed in unit. Deli meat was moved to walk-in to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

Establishment is using time as a public health for the pizza slices. Establishment has a variance but is not using logs as required. Establishment to start using logs for slices. Proper log use reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The pizza spatula was observed stored between the wall and the wall mounted ticket holder. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Spatula was moved to 3-bay. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
